reviews.comment:
Fui a lavar el auto. Tuve que indicarle al personal del sector de secado que estaban poniendo las alfombras de mi auto en otro. Prestar atención a esos detalles.

(Translated by Google)
I went to get my car washed. I had to tell the staff in the drying area that they were putting my car mats in another car. Pay attention to those details.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5256422588388150484/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURGbjhuQU9nEAE

reviews.comment:
Solo se salvó el pibe que despacha, un diez, el resto un afano

(Translated by Google)
Only the kid who serves the money was spared, a ten out of ten, the rest were a rip-off.

reviews.comment:
La atención suele ser ágil pero en esta época (Noviembre 2023) tienen problemas de abastecimiento como la mayoría de las estaciones en Capital.

(Translated by Google)
Service is usually quick, but at this time (November 2023), they have supply problems like most stations in the Capital.
